channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox that we put in a box, 14th July
item.description:
There is a dead fox that we put in empty Amazon box in black bean bag on pavement to hide from kids
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Grace Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings faded/painted over illegally, 14th July
item.description:
Resident (suspect) who is in dispute with a neighbour (victim) over parking appears to have painted over the restriction markings that the victim had paid to get installed outside 87 PRINCES PLAIN. The painting has subsequently left the markings faded or unclear. The victim requires access due to disability.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince's Plain, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park surface needs repairing, 14th July
item.description:
Some parts of the car park surface near Westbere House, St Mary Cray, needs repairing or re-surfacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 14th July
item.description:
Between Chiswell street and 60 Southampton way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chiswell Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins blocking pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Bins blocking pavement and road daily

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deepdene Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is new tagging happening, 14th July
item.description:
There is new tagging on A10 and Northwold Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Newington High Street, West Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road markings at the junction of Normanhurst Avenue with Gypsy Road, Bexleyheath DA7, 14th July
item.description:
The road markings are now so faded that they cannot be seen. This is a very busy junction with many vehicles and pedestrians. I have personally witnessed and also nearly been involved in a serious accident at this junction. Drivers, especially speeding delivery drivers, do not realise that they should give way at this junction as there are no clear road markings anymore. Many children walking home to and from school use this junction and the signs are not enough to warn the drivers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed, damaged and dangerous flood lights, 14th July
item.description:
3x flood lights used to illuminate Bromley north sign. These are wired into an LBB feeder pillar. These need removing urgently as are dangerous. Previously reported and to BID, nothing has been done and these have smashed further. Needs urgent intervention please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beside black junction box on warren st., 14th July
item.description:
Very large deep square hole in pavement. Two people have had bad falls because of it just today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Warren Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds inside Roberts Close Road sign, 14th July
item.description:
Weeds growing in the road sign for Roberts Close, St Mary Cray, BR5 4RA.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Human poo, 14th July
item.description:
Now two lots. Been there weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brighton Terrace, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Cut back the vegetation & remove tge barrier, 14th July
item.description:
Vegetation in communal area at rear of 11 - 15 Sholden Gardens, St Mary Cray, could do with cutting back. There’s also a large yellow plastic barrier in same location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson and 79 brindesbury riaf, 14th July
item.description:
Parking zones near car park need sweeping from foliage from trees
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London

item.title: Crash damaged, 14th July
item.description:
Car is badly damaged and untaxed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Damaged car park logs, 14th July
item.description:
Car park log near Westbere House, St Mary Cray is damaged. Part of the wood is at the side of 11 Sholden Gardens. There’s another loose log near the grass at front of Roberts Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lazy council, 14th July
item.description:
Tree has required pruning for months & will have someone’s eye out

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Broomfield Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 14th July
item.description:
Street light not working outside 6 Durban rd. For apx.2 months. Reported before, says fixed, but still not.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: An Irish male is storing a large amount of flammable diesel liquid outside on his drive. This is very concerning for other residents safety., 14th July
item.description:
Resident storing large amounts of diesel in a 1000 Litre IBC Tank Container Water Diesel Fuel Oil Storage Allotment Farm Field. ASAP investigation needs to be done. Members of public safety at risk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bays, 14th July
item.description:
The parking bays need repainting so as a driver you can see where the lines are.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
